title: Glowmethyst Squid
description: It's a Glow Squid made of Amethyst.
body:
**Glowmethyst Squids is a pack idea me and a friend had back when the Glow Squid got first announced. It's exactly what it sounds like. A Glow Squid that looks like it was made out of amethyst**

**Everything this pack modifies:**
- Glow Squid texture
- Glow Squid Spawn Egg
- Glow Ink Sac
- Glow Squid particles
- Glow Squid sounds
- Adds an Amethyst Cluster on the head of the Glow Squid model (Requires Optifine)

---

![Optifine Recommended](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7ac4b01aeb3919a7f9ff77d0747c299ed9ffe5de.png)

Disclaimer: Some features or minor aspects of this pack might require Optifine or an alternative like Fabulously Optimized. But the pack at its core still works perfectly fine in Vanilla Minecraft.
